title: Non-Craftable
description: Adding Mob Drops as Craftable Items
body:
# Non-Craftable ## Adding Craft to Non-Craftable Items Aims to improve minecraft making it possible to acquire items from mobs by crafting them instead of having to eliminate them. And brings back items that craft was removed.

Craftings * Line * Gunpowder * Bone * Blaze Rod * Ender Pearl * Glow Ink Sac * Ink Sac * Ghast Tears * Rotten Meat * Enchanted Golden Apple * Feather * Cobweb * Slime Ball * Bottle of Xp * Shulker Hull * Totem of Immortality * Iron Armor for Horse * Golden Armor for Horse * Diamond Armor for Horse * Prismarines Hard * Prismarine Crystals * Name Tag * Elytra
Credits * Noah-Oficial - Developer | Administrator | Project Manager * Erismut - Artist
